details.message: Greenhouse modern form requires 8-char email verification code post-submit. Confirmed on Apollo.io and Anthropic. Likely universal across all greenhouse modern (job-boards.greenhouse.io) forms.
details.snippet: A verification code was sent to cyshekari@gmail.com. To submit your application, enter the 8-character code to confirm you are a human.
details.additional: country dropdown also failed validation despite +1 selection — country option list is async-loaded large list, needs typeahead handling.
